name: Honey Basil Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1/4 teaspoon black pepper, or to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. In a plastic ziplock bag, combine vinegar, mustard, soy sauce, honey, basil, thyme, and pepper.
2. Add the chicken pieces to the bag and turn to coat evenly.
3. Marinate at room temperature for 15 minutes (marinating in the refrigerator overnight is also acceptable).
4. Grill the chicken, reserving the marinade, for 10-15 minutes or until thoroughly cooked.
5. If desired, heat the reserved marinade in a saucepan and reduce by half. Pour over the chicken before serving (optional).
